title: Ukraine Tax Declaration on Property Status and Income — Annex F4 (Real Estate and Movable Property Sale Income)
description: The State Tax Service of Ukraine's (Державна податкова служба України, DPS) "Додаток Ф4 до податкової декларації про майновий стан і доходи" (Annex Ф4 to the Tax Declaration on Property Status and Income) — the calculation of personal income tax and military-levy liabilities on income from the sale (exchange) of real estate and/or a divisible unfinished-construction object during the reporting (tax) year, and/or from the sale (exchange) of movable property (e.g. vehicles), per Articles 172 and 173 of the Tax Code of Ukraine. One of the ten companion schedules disclosed as open backlog when the parent declaration (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration, GOV-3531) was authored; the second of those ten to be modelled, after Annex АП (ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration-annex-ap, GOV-3588). Approved within the same combined Excel template as the main declaration, by Order of the Ministry of Finance of Ukraine No. 859 of 2 October 2015, as amended by Order No. 119 of 26 February 2025 (the edition modelled here, effective for reporting periods from 1 January 2026). Published, unauthenticated, directly by the State Tax Service on tax.gov.ua as a legacy Excel (.xls) template's own dedicated 'Ф4' sheet. This v1.0.0 models the Annex in full: the taxpayer-identification and declaration-type/period header (a year-only period box on this sheet, unlike Annex АП's own reporting-period month box), Розділ І's bounded three-entry real-estate sale/exchange table (object name and address, income not subject to tax under Article 172.1, income taxed at 5% under Article 172.2 first/fourth paragraph with its own PIT and military-levy columns, and income taxed at 18% under Article 172.2 second/third paragraph with its own documented-acquisition-cost, income-less-cost, PIT, and military-levy columns) plus its own annual total row, Розділ ІІ's identically-shaped bounded three-entry movable-property sale/exchange table (object name and make/model, income not subject to tax under Article 173.2 first paragraph, income taxed at 5% under Article 173.1/173.2 second paragraph, and income taxed at 18% under Article 173.2 third paragraph — whose own comparator column is instead the object's value under a one-time special voluntary declaration, per Chapter XX subdivision 94) plus its own annual total row, and Section III's eight-line tax-liability computation (non-taxable income carried to the parent declaration's line 11.2; total taxable income carried to line 10.5 column 3; PIT and military-levy totals, each split into the portion withheld by a tax agent — carried to line 10.5 columns 4/5 — and the portion payable by the taxpayer directly — carried to line 10.5 columns 6/7). GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Ukraine or the State Tax Service of Ukraine.

authority.name: Державна податкова служба України (State Tax Service of Ukraine)

source.documentRef: Форма Додатка Ф4 до податкової декларації про майновий стан і доходи, затверджена наказом Міністерства фінансів України від 02.10.2015 № 859 (у редакції наказу від 26.02.2025 № 119), чинна з 01.01.2026 — аркуш 'Ф4'

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3623, deepening Ukraine's own disclosed Taxes backlog by authoring the second of ten companion schedules to ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration (GOV-3531): Annex Ф4 (real estate and movable property sale-income computation), after Annex АП (GOV-3588). Re-fetched the same source workbook the parent declaration and Annex АП both cite (via the Wayback Machine, since tax.gov.ua itself still 403s direct sandbox fetches), confirmed byte-identical to the previously recorded sha256 (7c67f4c421a1a8fc610f9226819d223debcb56b3fd1fc3d5f75ce0247cc7f0ac). Parsed the workbook's own 'Ф4' sheet (!ref A1:CR70) cell-by-cell with the xlsx npm package, cross-referencing the sheet's own !merges array to resolve exactly which column range each header label spans, and confirmed the sheet's full row extent (row 70 is blank) so no trailing content was missed. Models the sheet in full: the taxpayer-identification and declaration-type/period header, Розділ І's three-entry real-estate table plus its own total row, Розділ ІІ's three-entry movable-property table plus its own total row, and Section III's eight-line PIT/military-levy computation. Confirmed via the sheet's own merged-cell layout that this header's period box has no companion month field (unlike Annex АП's own footnote-driven reportingPeriodMonth/correctedPeriodMonth pair) — a genuine structural difference, not an omission. Also confirmed the section-total rows (38, 52) total only the nine numeric columns per section, with the two lead identification columns instead carrying a single merged 'ВСЬОГО' label — matching the same convention already established by this registry's KZ Form 220.0X companion-schedule series. Both validators pass at 549/549; conformance fixtures re-derived against a from-scratch ajv mock validator built from the schema's own field definitions, per this registry's established practice. See this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full structural and sourcing record. No submission was made and no live cabinet.tax.gov.ua account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: taxpayerTaxNumberOrPassport
fields.label: Реєстраційний номер облікової картки платника податків або серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта
fields.description: The taxpayer's registration number of the taxpayer account card (RNOKPP), or — for individuals who, on religious grounds, have declined a registration number and have a corresponding notation in their passport — their passport series (if any) and number instead, matching the same either/or convention as ua/dps/individual-income-tax-declaration's own taxpayerTaxNumberOrPassport field.
fields.sourceRef: Rows 17-20: 'Реєстраційний номер облікової картки платника податків або серія (за наявності) та номер паспорта (для фізичних осіб, які через свої релігійні переконання відмовляються від прийняття реєстраційного номера облікової картки платника податків та офіційно повідомили про це відповідний контролюючий орган і мають відмітку у паспорті)'

fields.name: declarationType
fields.label: Тип декларації
fields.description: original = 'Звітна' (a regular declaration for the reporting period); revised_original = 'Звітна нова' (a new original filed to supersede a previously filed original for the same period, before the filing deadline); corrective = 'Уточнююча' (an amendment to an already-accepted declaration for a past period). Matches the same three enum values used across this registry's other UA DPS declaration schedules.
fields.sourceRef: Row 22/25: 'Тип декларації:' — Звітна (E25) / Звітна нова (K25) / Уточнююча (R25)

fields.name: reportingPeriodYear
fields.label: Звітний (податковий) період: рік
fields.sourceRef: Row 22/25, column AN: 'Звітний (податковий) період: рік'

fields.name: correctedPeriodYear
fields.label: Звітний (податковий) період, що уточнюється: рік
fields.description: The calendar year of the tax period being amended by this corrective filing. Unlike this registry's other UA DPS annex schedules (e.g. Annex АП), this sheet's header carries no companion 'місяць' (month) column in either period box — only a year is captured for both the reporting period and the period being corrected.
fields.sourceRef: Row 22/25, column BU: 'Звітний (податковий) період, що уточнюється: рік'
